# Arblok Digital

> Software house & digital agency from Tasikmalaya, West Java, Indonesia. Founded by Ardi, specializing in Monorepo architecture, Progressive Web Apps (PWA), AI integration, and zero-cost serverless solutions for UMKM (Small-Medium Enterprises) and government institutions.

## About

Arblok Digital is a software engineering studio founded by Ardi (Senior Full-Stack Developer & Software Architect) based in Tasikmalaya, Indonesia. We design and develop industry-grade software using Monorepo (NPM Workspaces) architecture, with zero-cost serverless hosting powered by PostgreSQL Row Level Security (RLS) and Supabase.

Our mission: empower local businesses, SMBs (UMKM), and public institutions with modern web technology and applied AI — without enterprise-level costs.

## Services

- Web & PWA Development: Premium landing pages, interactive company profiles, installable Progressive Web Apps
- E-Commerce & Marketplaces: Custom platforms, multi-vendor portals, integrated payment gateways
- Point of Sale (POS) Systems: KasirPro F&B and KasirPro Grosiran variants
- Bureaucracy Digitalization: E-Warga platform for RT/RW/District/Civil Registry document flow
- Custom Software & Workflow Pipelines: Rule-based approval systems, document tracking, hierarchical auth
- AI Integration: Server-side AI proxy, document classification, OCR extraction, cognitive automation
- Monorepo Architecture Consulting: NPM Workspaces setup, shared codebase strategy
- Zero-Cost Serverless Optimization: RLS-based direct-to-DB architecture

## Products (Production-Ready)

### KasirPro F&B
Cloud-native point-of-sale system for restaurants and F&B businesses. Features: instant cash register, daily/monthly analytics, real-time ingredient inventory, mobile-friendly responsive PWA, offline mode.
Live: https://kasirpro-fnb-app.vercel.app/

### KasirPro Grosiran
Wholesale POS & inventory management for supply chains and high-volume transactions. Features: multi-warehouse management, tiered pricing, automated stock sync, profit/loss statements.
Live: https://kasirproid-app-grosiran.vercel.app/

### E-Warga
Village-level automatic certificate processing platform from RT, RW, District, to Civil Registry (Disdukcapil). Features: monorepo architecture, centralized workflow pipeline, automatic KTP/KK file compression (<150KB), free WhatsApp click-to-chat notifications (no API fees).

### SekolahPro
Integrated school information & academic portal for administration, teachers, students, and parents. Features: unified portal, tuition ledger, report cards (Kurikulum Merdeka), WhatsApp/SMS gateway announcements.
Live: https://sekolah-pro.vercel.app/

### Onyx Terminal
AI-driven crypto market intelligence platform. Features: pattern detection, real-time social sentiment analysis, modular dashboard, anomalous volume alerts, whale wallet tracker.
Live: https://onyx-terminal-v1.vercel.app/

### Solana Warung
Web3 retail e-commerce with blockchain micro-payments integration. Features: instant Web3 micro-transactions with near-zero gas fees, on-chain digital coupon verification, encrypted decentralized inventory.
Award: Top 100 Global - Google Developer Groups #JuaraVibeCoding Competition
Credential ID: JVC2605-N74Z-Y7DN
Verify: https://goo.gle/jvc-cert-verifier

### CoordinationApp
Hierarchical task coordination for large field organizations, campaign volunteers, youth communities. Features: rank-based task division, photo-attached progress reports, hierarchical review dashboard, encrypted activity logs.

## Tech Stack

Frontend: React 19, Vite 6, TypeScript 5.8, Tailwind CSS 4, Motion (Framer Motion), Lucide Icons
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Vercel Serverless Functions
Database: PostgreSQL (with Row Level Security), Supabase
AI/ML: Google Gemini, NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Llama, Nemotron
Architecture: Monorepo (NPM Workspaces), Serverless, Offline-First PWA
Web3: Solana, Anchor Protocol, Web3.js
Integration: WhatsApp Click-to-Chat, REST APIs, WebSockets

## Pricing Approach

Flexible and negotiable. No budget is too small. We offer:
- Starter / MVP packages for budget-conscious UMKM
- Mid-range custom development
- Enterprise-grade full systems
- Pricing adjusted to project complexity and client capacity
- Free initial consultation via WhatsApp

## Industries Served

- UMKM / Small-Medium Enterprises
- Food & Beverage (F&B) / Restaurants / Cafes
- Retail / Wholesale / Distribution
- Government (RT/RW, Kelurahan, Kecamatan, Disdukcapil)
- Education (Schools / Academic Institutions)
- Crypto / Web3 / Blockchain Projects
- Custom enterprise software

## Key Differentiators

1. Zero-Cost Hosting: RLS-based direct database access eliminates need for dedicated backend servers
2. Monorepo Architecture: Shared codebase reduces duplication, future-proofs scalability
3. WhatsApp Without API Fees: Click-to-chat deep links, no monthly third-party costs
4. File Compression: Client-side compression keeps storage under 150KB per file
5. Bilingual Support: Full ID/EN capability for both local and international clients
6. Award-Winning: Top 100 Global recognition from Google Developer Groups

## What People Ask

### How much does it cost to build a website with Arblok Digital?
Our pricing is flexible. We offer starter packages starting from very affordable rates for UMKM. Contact us via WhatsApp for a free consultation tailored to your budget.

### What is zero-cost hosting?
We use PostgreSQL Row Level Security (RLS) to connect frontend apps directly to a cloud database — no dedicated backend server needed. This means $0/month hosting costs for typical UMKM workloads.

### Can I customize the software after it's built?
Absolutely. We use Monorepo architecture (NPM Workspaces) that makes future modifications fast and cost-effective. No code duplication, just import shared business logic.

### How long does development take?
Depends on complexity. A landing page/PWA typically takes 1-3 weeks. Full custom systems like E-Warga or KasirPro take 1-3 months. We'll give you a timeline during the free consultation.

### Do you provide maintenance after launch?
Yes. We offer flexible maintenance packages and can train your team to manage the system independently.
